name: Team Warner
subject: Barr Should Resign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
One thing is clear: Barr is unfit for office. Sign our petition demanding Barr's resignation.
|
---
| | Derek --

Time and time again, U.S. Attorney General Barr has proven that he is more committed to protecting Trump than protecting the rule of law.

Earlier this week, _The Washington Post_ confirmed that Barr **personally gave the order to violently clear peaceful protesters demonstrating against police brutality in front of the White House.** These protesters, who were demonstrating for Black lives, were forcibly cleared using violent tactics including tear gas. **All for a photo op for Donald Trump.**

**That's not all.**

Under Barr's guidance, the Justice Department is dropping the criminal case against Donald Trump's first national security adviser Michael Flynn. Even after Mark Warner pressured the Administration to release intelligence proving that Flynn lied to the FBI and that he was under investigation for a very good reason, Barr has continued to advance Donald Trump's personal interests over the interests of justice.

**One thing is clear: Barr is unfit for office.** He is acting as Donald Trump's personal lawyer instead of fulfilling his duty to act in the public's best interest.

**[Sign our petition demanding Barr's resignation.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d44b/53d9897e/5486de77/1c887df4/1041258611/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/sign-the-petition-attorney-general-barr-must-resign-immediately?source=2020BarrResign_FHM&referrer=group-friends-of-mark-warner&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-barrresignja")**

Thank you for your support.

-- Team Warner
| **[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d44b/53d9897e/5486de77/1c887df3/1041258611/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjYwMiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-barrresignja?refcode=20200603_p_1_fl__602__&refcode2=cont&amount=10")**
---

|
---

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d44b/53d9897e/5486de77/1c887df2/1041258611/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dave=20Lindstrom?=
subject: Kansans Elect Our Next Senator!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lindstromforsenate.com/kansans-elect-our-next-senator?e=41f8e27552)
---
| |
---
| | Last week I officially filed to be on the ballot for the Republican nomination for the U.S. Senate from Kansas. I joined this race because I believe that this seat belongs to We the People of Kansas, not to the Washington insiders, party bosses and coastal liberals, who are attempting to dictate who the next senator is. This week alone, we’ve had the _New York Times_ and _Politico_ further the story line that only one Republican can win the Senate seat, a move that Topeka party bosses have tried to use to force me and others from this race. Now, ultraliberal DC-stalwart Daily Kos is circulating a poll trying to show that their ultraliberal ally, Barbara Bollier, could win Kansas. Yes, ultraliberal DC swamp dwellers who couldn’t tell Scott City from Ulysses are now attempting to dictate Kansas’ next senator. This Senate seat belongs to the people of Kansas and the people of Kansas will decide who our next senator will be. They do not want to be told by Washington who the next senator will be and they do not want to be told that Washington knows what’s best for them. As I talk to people across our state, I have learned what they want in a senator and that’s a senator who will represent Kansas in Washington. A senator who believes in term limits and will return home after they are done in Washington. I will be that senator.

Dave

P.S. Click on the logo below to help bring our message to all the people of Kansas.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Joe=20Reynolds=20|=20US=20Senate?=
subject: Your Vote Makes It Happen
body:
The Republican primary election is June 9. | | | |
---

Team Reynolds is out and on the move again in the race to win the Republican primary election on
June 9!

Meet the Weber family who have helped our campaign reach the people of Charleston during the time of social distancing...

---
|
---

in the

_**DUMP LINDSEY**_

dump truck!
---
| | | The last few months have proven difficult in so many different ways. For us, Covid's biggest impact was halting our campaign of get out and meet the people where they gather. While we changed tack to reaching people digitally, we watched and listened every day online how our community and our nation were affected and conflicted by this virus. During runs to help deliver food boxes to those in need we witnessed the tremendous outpouring of community action that is the essence of who we are and how we come together as Americans. People are still struggling financially and emotionally while others were thankful for an unexpected time out from their daily grind. The reality was that we were all in the same storm though certainly not the same boat.

Sadly, as we slowly began to emerge from our lockdowns , a new storm erupted as riots spread across our country in response to the death of George Floyd. The protests even spilled over to other nations emphasizing that the world still looks to us to be that shining city of fairness and opportunity in the world. I am confident that though we will fight, grieve, injure, and pray, we will find our way through, continuing to come together and always striving to form a more perfect union.

As these storms rage around us, the world still turns. There is still a primary election approaching on June 9. We are thankful that our state legislature made the decision to open our absentee voting to everyone without qualification. This leadership decision gives everyone the safest options to vote, to be heard, to participate in the governance that shapes our state and nation.
---
| |
---
We have been genuinely touched by the support we have gotten for this campaign. When the votes are counted, I am trusting that the most people will have chosen the candidate whose platform is built on ethics, service, solutions, and integrity and I will be able to help weather the storms our nation faces as I have weathered those at sea.
---
|
---
| | BE WELL
KEEP SPREADING THE WORD
AND VOTE
IN THE REPUBLICAN PRIMARY
FOR US SENATE
ON JUNE 9!
---
| | | | [](https://reynolds2020.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=916b511ece2bb92a8c0d875a1&id=f271d9c8ea&e=6e84008331)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: More violence is met with more silence
body:
David Dorn, a retired St. Louis police captain, was shot and killed last night while trying to protect a local store from looters. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1896ac4564&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • June 3, 2020
---
| | |
# **More violence is met with more silence**

**David Dorn** , a retired St. Louis police captain, [was shot and killed last night](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=51bdfa6bcb&e=3ee4985eea) while trying to protect a local store from looters. Horrific video footage showed that he died in front of Lee’s Pawn & Jewelry on Martin Luther King Drive.

[President Trump: “Our highest respect to the family of David Dorn”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=990c7b1dec&e=3ee4985eea)

**It’s popular right now** among many celebrities, Democrat politicians, and media personalities to excuse, ignore, and sometimes outright glorify the violence happening on our streets. To them, it isn’t real life—it’s a movie playing out in somebody else’s backyard.

**The people** who live in these communities don’t want violence. George Floyd’s own family, grieving the unjust death of their loved one, pleaded with protesters to be peaceful. “Don’t tear up your town. All of this is not necessary because if his own family and blood is not doing it, then why are you?” [Floyd’s brother said](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8ab260a149&e=3ee4985eea).

**“My brother** wasn’t about that. My brother was about peace.”

**Now is the time** for all of us to listen. It is the stories from outside Washington, from American communities, that go untold amid the cable TV feuds and misleading headlines.
Here are just a few of those stories:

* [**Minneapolis woman with a disability in tears**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b270caac4c&e=3ee4985eea) after seeing her community torn apart

* [**African-American store owner condemns**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e39de5e240&e=3ee4985eea) rioters in New York, saying “look what they did to my store”

* [**NYPD officers being attacked**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=089fe3c9af&e=3ee4985eea) openly on the streets

* [**Local mom-and-pop shop destroyed**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1575a2eea5&e=3ee4985eea) in the Bronx, crushing a family’s years’ worth of work in just minutes

* [**Multiple black-owned businesses destroyed**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=489b778029&e=3ee4985eea) in Philadelphia

* [**Molotov cocktail thrown**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=bd5cc170ff&e=3ee4985eea) into an NYPD vehicle

**Innocent people** getting hurt or killed should matter to everyone. So should the small businesses and neighborhoods that have been torched or looted by rioters.

**The real pain** being felt in these communities isn’t a distraction from injustice—it _is_ injustice. President Trump shouldn’t be alone in condemning it. All politicians, including the mayors and governors turning a blind eye to violence, have a responsibility to protect every single person in their communities.

**President Trump** wants justice for every victim of rioting AND for every American who has suffered from racial cruelty. Oftentimes, these are the same victims. We need to stand up for them, not look on idly as their neighborhoods are destroyed by criminals.

🎬 **Press Secretary:**[First Amendment doesn’t protect looting or violence](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c72f2af2ee&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e78434c919&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0b66bdd89a&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=0af8409b94)
---

name: Steve Chabot
subject: A One-Two Punch
body:
A challenging time in our nation's history... No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-v/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A One-Two Punch](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-j/)
This past week has been a particular challenging time in our nation's history. A Minneapolis police officer knelt on the neck of an unarmed African-American man named George Floyd, and while the world watched, his life was unnecessarily taken away. Condemnation of the officer's action has been universal. There's no excuse for what this officer did.Protests have arisen in cities all over America, peaceful gatherings that are no doubt our constitutional right. Unfortunately, these protests have been sullied by violence and looting. [In this week's blog](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-t/), I discuss this turmoil and offer some words of hope. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-i/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-d/)
### [Trump vs Biden](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-h/)
In this week's blog post I discuss the state of the presidential campaign between President Trump and Joe Biden. How has the coronavirus pandemic changed the race? Who do I think will win? And, why is Biden hunkered down in his basement? [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-u/)
### [A Missed Opportunity](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-o/)
Nancy Pelosi's House of Representatives got together last week to vote on legislation crafted by the Democrats - without input from the Republicans. In this week's blog, I discuss this "messaging" bill, which does nothing to help cope with the coronavirus challenge and has no chance at becoming law. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-b/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-n/)
### [Reopening America - Safely](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-p/)
For about two months now, much of America has been more or less shut down due to the COVID-19 pandemic. In this week's blog, I discuss President Trump's Reopen America Task Force and Ohio's reopening plan, known as the Responsible RestartOhio Plan. There will be challenges, however I think we Americans will prevail! [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-x/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-m/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-c/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-q/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-f/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkwmhd-kujkulhluu-z/)
---|---|---

name: Bill Hagerty
subject: I am honored and humbled
body:
As a Christian conservative who is 100 percent pro-life
Peter,As a Christian conservative who is 100 percent pro-life, I am honored and humbled that Susan B. Anthony List joins President Donald Trump in endorsing me:_" We are excited to endorse Bill Hagerty for Senate and are fully confident he will be an unwavering pro-life advocate. name: Mike Siegel
subject: “forgery in progress”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MIKE SIEGEL FOR CONGRESS](https://click
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17742768/204907033/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVkNjU1ZC02Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JO8rs5iJJCDIWf3dWg_xJWYqdgyoV-3t-7_LWDqtiU=&emci=88f76d56-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=2f5d655d-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter,

**The murder of George Floyd started with three words: “forgery in progress.”** You may know the story that brought us here. Mr. Floyd went to a grocery store and paid with a $20 bill — but the currency was no good. The shop owner called the police. And like so many times before, the officers who responded took a Black man’s life. **For a $20 crime.** This may go without saying, but I will say it: if I had paid with that bill, I would be alive today. My body would not have been on a Minneapolis street. No officer would have pushed their knee into my neck. If a white man from a privileged background pays with a fake $20 bill? 99 times out of 100, it would be dismissed as “a mistake.” The moment we are in is historic — massive nationwide protests to demand an end to racist police killings. During a health pandemic that has taken over 100,000 lives. During an economic crisis. Under a dictatorial and vindictive president. Yet I am struck by this incident in another way — as a father. Because I have a counterfeit $20 bill in my possession right now, given to me by my daughter.

How did she get it? Well, she’s eight years old, and a Girl Scout. Like countless girls across the nation, she was busy selling cookies this Spring. Learning economics and team-building and communication skills and more. And one day, someone bought several boxes of cookies and gave her a fake $20 bill. We didn’t realize it until later. If you haven’t sold Girl Scout cookies before — the parents buy cookies in advance, and then pay ourselves back as we make sales. Weeks ago, my wife went to deposit the money we collected, and happened to notice this bill. It didn’t feel right. On closer inspection, even though much of the design is the same, you can see words that are different. It says “Motion Picture Use Purposes.” So we wrote it off as a loss. And I had the bill on my desk when I learned how George Floyd was killed. You may know this: my daughter is Black. Her mother is Nigerian-American. Living in Texas—let’s be honest, living in the United States—she is perceived differently than I was at her age. And maybe at 8-years old, a shop owner wouldn’t perceive her as a threat if she tried to buy candy or Pokémon cards with this counterfeit bill. Maybe. But what if she was a little older? 10 years old? 12 years old? At what point does your life become expendable in this country, by virtue of the color of your skin? It shouldn’t be this way. Racism may be the “original sin” of the United States, as some have said, but it does not have to be our destiny. That is why we are in the streets. That is why in every state in the Union, in towns big and small, people young and old are marching for justice. **And to demand that Black Lives Matter.** As a candidate for Congress, my pledge is to fight for major criminal justice reforms. Several leading members of Congress, including Congresswomen Ayanna Pressley and Barbara Lee, have put forward essential bills that will create accountability for local police. A database of police abuse; ending qualified immunity for officers who violate constitutional rights; stopping the transfer of military equipment to local police; and investing in Black and other over-policed communities, to lay the foundation for transformative change. I will certainly fight for these reforms. In the Texas 10th, we have our own history of racist policing. Sandra Bland died in police custody in Waller County, after a racist and unconstitutional arrest. Rodney Reed has been on Texas Death Row for decades — for a crime likely committed by a white former police officer. There are countless reasons to demand change at every level of government, right now. And one of those reasons is for the future. To protect our children as they grow up in this society. To ensure that their lives will be treated as sacred. To make certain that Black Lives Matter. Fighting for you,
Mike Siegel
* * *
**[Facebook](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17742769/204907034/-1950142826?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVkNjU1ZC02Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JO8rs5iJJCDIWf3dWg_xJWYqdgyoV-3t-7_LWDqtiU=&emci=88f76d56-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=2f5d655d-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172) [Twitter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17742770/204907035/862725720?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVkNjU1ZC02Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JO8rs5iJJCDIWf3dWg_xJWYqdgyoV-3t-7_LWDqtiU=&emci=88f76d56-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=2f5d655d-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172) [Campaign website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17742771/204907036/-1686464446?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVkNjU1ZC02Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JO8rs5iJJCDIWf3dWg_xJWYqdgyoV-3t-7_LWDqtiU=&emci=88f76d56-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=2f5d655d-6ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=6233172)** [ Donate Now ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17742772/204907037/203122784?refcode=embutton&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjVkNjU1ZC02Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=5JO8rs5iJJCDIWf3dWg_xJWYqdgyoV-3t-7_LWDqtiU=)

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: VOTES ARE STILL BEING COUNTED! TRYING TO BE PATIENT FOR THE FINAL RESULTS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| |
# **VOTES ARE STILL BEING COUNTED!**
# **TRYING TO BE PATIENT FOR THE FINAL RESULTS**
>
> **This has been a long strange trip. The election was delayed by a pandemic and punctuated by civil unrest after the murder of George Floyd - and yet here we are - on the verge of winning. I owe it all to you. With almost all the votes counted in counties where my opponents did their best, and hundreds of thousands of votes still to be counted in counties where my support was the strongest - we are in striking distance of winning. ** ** It will take a few days for our hardworking election commissioners across the state to sort everything out - but my spirits are high! I owe all to you. Your hard work and support has put me on the doorstep of victory. I'll keep you posted - but I wanted to say from the bottom of my heart: ** **THANK YOU!**
>
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvTzF8781XsEe1UaJPs2NsLjzPwG1xteyRd-KwH1EUY=/MhV6ix8YRI6oEr_oxVb6NjTObHiSfmjIeWNy4ArVMRI=) Learn more by visiting our website: [**_www.NinaForPA.com_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvTzF8781XsEe1UaJPs2NsLjzPwG1xteyRd-KwH1EUY=/ypqkOaGsBn3w2s0WGL9zlj3DdlBikiNy8WkhjUdYm8w=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvTzF8781XsEe1UaJPs2NsLjzPwG1xteyRd-KwH1EUY=/VgqubE60DC-1dMJUEVHG_sr7N957LO3eRL5IRnb5TwQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvTzF8781XsEe1UaJPs2NsLjzPwG1xteyRd-KwH1EUY=/LSdH0EwmVvDTDYVz7RlHk2sTojbWP5SgZ18v7xqCYpE=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/gvTzF8781XsEe1UaJPs2NsLjzPwG1xteyRd-KwH1EUY=/UFhQ-cYWYzrkCekLARamD-coAmgI5JzbSN1Iyl-Niwg=?hl=en)

subject: about last month...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Peter,
Last Sunday I would have normally asked for help reaching our end of month fundraising goal. I’d have mentioned our progress, how much we needed to close the gap, then asked for a contribution.
None of that was necessary because of the generosity of one man, Bill Freeman. You know Bill because of his unyielding commitment to electing Democrats and his many contributions to Democratic candidates and progressive organizations throughout the years. Last month, he generously contributed our ENTIRE goal in response to a fundraising email. We are so grateful for his contribution, giving us the resources we need to keep fighting to elect more Democrats at every level of government. Thank you so very much, Bill!
As excited as we are, fundraising remains critical in order to take on the GOP. With your help, we can keep up the momentum that Bill so generously jump-started. With all the injustice and lack of leadership we’re seeing from Republicans, supporting Democrats has never been more important.
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Thank you,
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
--
Mary Mancini
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: Help Us Run This Recall Walz Commercial
body:
| [ ](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=1)
---
Peter -- I don't need to tell you that Minnesota is in bad shape with Governor Walz at the helm. Whether its lawless rioters looting and burning down businesses in Minneapolis or his illegal shutdown that is putting people out of work, Walz is failing us! Every week that Walz' illegal shutdown continues, we lose more of our beloved restaurants, bars, resorts and hair salons. And the more people out of work, the more unrest we're likely to encounter anytime things go sideways in the process of seeking justice for George Floyd. What is Walz waiting for? Wisconsin has been open for 3 weeks and there's no spike in COVID related deaths. Even Michigan's leftist governor opened up her state after making her constituents suffer for months. The Legislature convenes next week, but we have very low confidence that they are going to do what's needed to End Walz' Illegal Emergency Powers. So we are putting the fate of Minnesota in the hands of the People...where it belongs! **Action 4 Liberty is going to run this commercial across Minnesota on streaming services like Hulu and YouTubeTv. It will cost us a lot of money, but the mission is important. If we want to Recall Walz, we must get the message out.** [](http://www.action4liberty.com/recall_walz_commercial?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=2) Help us get this commercial out to hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans by donating today. | [](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=3 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=4)
---
We must put the pressure on Walz now! Who knows what next week has in store for our suffering state under Walz' failed leadership.
**[Please help us with a contribution of $25, $50, $100, $250, or get us a lot of air play with a donation of $1,000](https://action4liberty.nationbuilder.com/donate?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=5).**
**In Liberty,

**
**Jake Duesenberg**
**President, Action 4 Liberty**
Action 4 Liberty · United States

You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](http://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=help_us_run_this_walz_com&n=7).

name: Dr. Chuck Dietzen
subject: Thank you, Fellow Hoosier
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Chuck for Congress, Inc
body:
Tuesday, we fell short. But we must continue working to build a better future for our great nation. READ MORE >>
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/bacec9afc5d2867b/ed382ac543c05f32c3d6b838967d376c/33363) Fellow Hoosier, The results are in. Unfortunately, we fell short on Tuesday. It’s certainly not the outcome we were working toward. But I know we gave this primary election our all, under unprecedented and challenging circumstances. **Having you on the team meant so much to me**. THANK YOU to everyone, for all of the encouragement, prayers, and support that fueled my run to serve the Fifth District and our great nation. America is hurting. But I know we can be a force for healing and a better way forward. That’s what this campaign was all about, and I remain fully dedicated to this mission. Thank you, again, for all your support. I’m proud of the amazing grassroots team we built in this race, and how we’ve impacted the political conversation here in the Fifth District. You should be too. God bless Indiana and God bless America. \- Dr. Chuck Dietzen [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/bacec9afc5d2867b/1ef698f6f9b69352c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/bacec9afc5d2867b/599044e8e64133d2c3d6b838967d376c/33363) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/8358a878bca5394edf60ac364a9f256a/33363/bacec9afc5d2867b/773412100447dc66c3d6b838967d376c/33363)

name: J.D. Scholten
subject: "Not Steve King" isn’t good enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten4Iowa Campaign Committee
body:
---
Peter,

I wanted to thank you all for the support we’ve received from Day 1 of this campaign, when we were first written off by the establishment circles of the Republican and Democratic parties, all the way through yesterday’s primary, where we ran unopposed.

We have people power on our side that will push us through to November, where we’ll be taking on Randy Feenstra.

This election is not going to be easy, Peter. But it wasn’t easy in 2018, and we came _within 3 points_ of defeating Steve King.

**This time, we know we can win.**

That’s because "not Steve King" isn’t good enough. It’s not enough to not be blatantly racist. We need someone who will fight for our farmers to get a fair price and for our families to be able to afford quality healthcare, put food on the table, and save for retirement. To do that, we can’t keep propping up the corporate system that is sucking wealth and opportunities out of our district like Randy does.

**We don’t need another representative who is already bought and owned by corporate interests and the 1%.**

That’s the problem with career politicians who are disconnected from our own communities. Here’s a promise: I have no interest in being a career politician. I believe in serving my community and then passing the torch.

I’m ready to leave it all on the field -- and I’ll hope you be there with me.

Once again, thank you for everything.

Standing Tall for All,

J.D. name: Mondaire Jones
subject: It's been a difficult week
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_ Our mailing address is:
body:
It’s been a difficult week to be black in America. I’d be lying if I said I haven’t cried often in between rallying for justice and campaigning for Congress. | | | [
](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/BQE/ni0YAA/t.32c/1wdvx-fqSfS6eDfihCI54w/h0/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNKVYo5ChTqtfPDsuvWIeDghOju8P406s8hvjyisZbWjbkqWECf1YfESgAZllrUp4s-2BpZg3vlRz85ABW0YhbyS2f-2Fk0EOSk8GM9EVEeqSneyg-2BH7fG2B-2BjGKd34dvdSZYDh7rDJugnUzNHBPjQYhw-2F-2Fr8BYt5zhByMHnDmXS0zYRUMQSQQEipP5uPQN0mQfU7cVspe5vpOdB-2B2pwpGxJsDDb0KwhC5p1v9YeEPkVCCITZuY708GZp-2FC9rHa9kgatqCDHAtCJyHdgZGi72kqyGQmXgq3VIcvx5ytAD9JH1ozoXg-3D-3D/iwyL) Friend, **** **** **** It’s been a difficult week to be black in America. I’d be lying if I said I haven’t cried often in between rallying for justice and campaigning for Congress. Last week alone, a woman named Amy Cooper called the NYPD and lied about an “African-American man” threatening her life in Central Park. In actuality, that man had simply asked Ms. Cooper to leash her dog, which would have brought her into compliance with a well-publicized rule. In Louisville, Kentucky, protests intensified over the shooting death by police officers in March of an unarmed black woman named Breonna Taylor, whose home police officers barged into shortly after midnight in search of two men believed to be selling drugs. And on May 28th, a horrific video surfaced showing Derek Chauvin, an officer with the Minneapolis Police Department, slowly murder in broad daylight an unarmed black man, George Floyd, as other officers stood by and did nothing. Black Americans like me are constantly retraumatized by these stories and images. We are tired of having to march, protest, and riot to get justice from governments whose job it is to deliver it. And we are tired of watching police officers brutalize and kill us with impunity. But we know these problems run much deeper than police violence. Institutional racism is everywhere. Institutional racism pervades our criminal legal system. Black people are arrested at disproportionately high rates, including in New York’s 17th Congressional District. Black people are more likely to be prosecuted than white people who are arrested for the same crimes. And black people are sentenced more harshly than white people convicted for the same crimes. Institutional racism is also present throughout our economic system. The net worth of the average white household is 10 times that of the average black household. Black people are less likely to grow up in school districts with quality public schools, and more likely to graduate college with significant student debt. Black people are more likely to be uninsured or underinsured, and more likely to contract -- and die from -- preventable ailments like diabetes and asthma. Black people are more likely to experience homelessness or live in homes that endanger their health, and less likely to have access to public transit. The protests we are seeing are not just about George Floyd. They are not even just about police killings. They are an expression of deep frustration with systems and leadership that shortchange black people, and a government that is at best indifferent to our plight. Weeks like this redouble my commitment to change that reality. In NY-17, I am humbled to fight alongside thousands of people of all ages, orientations, genders, colors, economic backgrounds, and creeds, to advance the cause of racial justice. As I watch my opponents scramble to add criminal justice reform -- something I have called for since the moment I entered this race -- to their platforms, or suddenly co-sponsor a policing reform bill that has been sitting before their state legislative bodies for years, I am reminded that we desperately need people in office who do not need nationwide protests to treat racial injustice with urgency. Black people shouldn’t have to take to the streets for our elected officials to lift the boot off of our throats. That’s why we need people in office for whom policy is personal. The problems we face are human-made, and they can be solved. A better world can be ours if we fight for it. Together, we are going to bring the change this district and our country so desperately need. In solidarity, Mondaire

name: SHOCKING NEWS (from UNITEDemocrats)
subject: we NEVER saw this coming →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by UNITEDemocrats PAC
body:
We can't believe what we just read:

| [**_BREAKING (and SHOCKING) NEWS:_
Former Secretary of Defense, General James Mattis, CONDEMNS Trump as a threat to the U.S. Constitution.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17746791/204990793/-1337705660?refcode=VC_UD_20200604_EMPOLL_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Mattis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMWIzZmIxLThhYTYtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XrbllTUu1isSZO036AGBm5C2yeIyCjq0-Y-7_KXYrcw=&emci=d5874a77-15a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=5f1b3fb1-8aa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4584036) Peter -- This is absolutely WILD!

General James Mattis (considered a hero by many in our military) just _absolutely slammed_ Trump in a way no one saw coming.

We are witnessing the consequences of three years of this deliberate effort. We are witnessing the consequences of three years without mature leadership.

**_We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution..."_**
---
Peter, we couldn't agree more!

**Frankly, it's about time that public leaders like General Mattis speak up against Trump's ruthless attempts to become America's first dictator.**

We've just launched an urgent poll for 5,000 Democrats like you to tell us if you agree with General Mattis on this. Please, answer the poll below before 11:00 PM tonight. >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/17746792/204990794/-1337705660?refcode=VC_UD_20200604_EMPOLL_E1_T0-S0SL0C0_AC_Mattis&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzgxNTI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVmMWIzZmIxLThhYTYtZWExMS05YjA1LTAwMTU1ZDAzOWU3NCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XrbllTUu1isSZO036AGBm5C2yeIyCjq0-Y-7_KXYrcw=&emci=d5874a77-15a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=5f1b3fb1-8aa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=4584036)

name: Reverend Warnock
subject: George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery and so many others.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
The names are different but the story is the same.
| | |
---
Friend,

As a citizen and as pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church, I stand with all those in Atlanta and across the country who seek to peacefully demonstrate their outrage against the institutionalized violence that took the lives of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery and so many others.
**Like them - like you, friend - I am hurting.**
There is a deep sense of pain and anguish in a moment like this, where the names are different but the story is the same. There is no acceptable explanation for the sheer brutality we see in our world. There is no acceptable justification for the bigotry and racism that leave black bodies unprotected and unsafe.
I know what it feels like to be profiled as a teenager at a grocery store for walking around with my hands in my pockets. I know what it feels like to be stopped and frisked, and - when not to be discovered shoplifting - not even to receive an apology. I know that humiliation and that pain. And I know those feelings are all too familiar for black Americans across this country.
As people from Minneapolis to Atlanta to Nashville rise up in this fight for justice, I don't want us to forget the words of Martin Luther King Jr., who said that riots are the language of the unheard. Too often, our people have not seen the kind of justice that they expect to see - instead, they see two criminal justice systems: one for people of color and one for white people.
We're frustrated. We're tired. But the fact that people are responding to injustice by peacefully demonstrating on the streets of Atlanta and across our country suggests that even in the midst of this dark night, there is hope. This is precisely what it means to be a part of the greatest country on the planet, but we still have a long way to go in order to be greater.
**I 'll leave you with one final thought, friend:** In these times, we ought not be distracted by undisciplined provocateurs of hate who engage in looting or who tweet about shooting to hijack the message. Our ground is the higher ground of love - love for ourselves and our neighbors. Love everybody, and we will win.
**If you 're called to action today, in the name of all the black lives lost to bigotry and racism, I invite you to make a contribution to the [_Atlanta Solidarity Fund_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e446/288179be/b1ea787/348eac6c/243873874/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI1Ny1vdC1uZCJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://actionnetwork.org/fundraising/contribute-to-the-atlanta-solidarity-fund?refcode=jtk257-ot-nd") or the [_Southwest Georgia Project_](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e446/288179be/b1ea787/348eac6d/243873874/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azI1Ny1vdC1uZCJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/southwest-georgia-project-1?refcode=jtk257-ot-nd") ****- community organizations leading the fight for racial justice.** We'll get through this, as tough as it is. Let's roll up our sleeves and claim the best in our democracy.
In solidarity,

Reverend Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e446/288179be/b1ea787/348eac6e/243873874/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

clean_body: The names are different but the story is the same. | | | Friend, As a citizen and as pastor of Ebenezer Baptist Church, I stand with all those in Atlanta and across the country who seek to peacefully demonstrate their outrage against the institutionalized violence that took the lives of George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Ahmaud Arbery and so many others. Like them - like you, friend - I am hurting. There is a deep sense of pain and anguish in a moment like this, where the names are different but the story is the same. There is no acceptable explanation for the sheer brutality we see in our world. There is no acceptable justification for the bigotry and racism that leave black bodies unprotected and unsafe. I know what it feels like to be profiled as a teenager at a grocery store for walking around with my hands in my pockets. I know what it feels like to be stopped and frisked, and - when not to be discovered shoplifting - not even to receive an apology. I know that humiliation and that pain. And I know those feelings are all too familiar for black Americans across this country. As people from Minneapolis to Atlanta to Nashville rise up in this fight for justice, I don't want us to forget the words of Martin Luther King Jr., who said that riots are the language of the unheard. Too often, our people have not seen the kind of justice that they expect to see - instead, they see two criminal justice systems: one for people of color and one for white people. We're frustrated. We're tired. But the fact that people are responding to injustice by peacefully demonstrating on the streets of Atlanta and across our country suggests that even in the midst of this dark night, there is hope. This is precisely what it means to be a part of the greatest country on the planet, but we still have a long way to go in order to be greater. I 'll leave you with one final thought, friend: In these times, we ought not be distracted by undisciplined provocateurs of hate who engage in looting or who tweet about shooting to hijack the message. Our ground is the higher ground of love - love for ourselves and our neighbors. Love everybody, and we will win. If you 're called to action today, in the name of all the black lives lost to bigotry and racism, I invite you to make a contribution to the "" or the "" - community organizations leading the fight for racial justice. We'll get through this, as tough as it is. Let's roll up our sleeves and claim the best in our democracy. In solidarity, Reverend Warnock | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. "" | | (C) 2020 | Paid for by Warnock for Georgia. Title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. PO Box 991 Decatur, GA 30031

body:
Washington is a mess, and we need new leadership to change that. Our team will help you stay informed, stay safe, and cast your vote by the June 23 primary.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17748783/205032460/1003843848?refcode=20200604_em_fr_KYprimary_all_hdr_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdhZmNkMS05Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEd3x9bkR6bj4yQHhXui3DukseYrgkV1XOR_V3hvWXs=)

| Friends -- During moments of crisis, we look to leaders for inspiration, unity, and direction. But we’ve seen no leadership, no unity, and no direction to move our country forward collectively, leaving many folks wondering: What do we do next? **My answer: Vote.** There are many ways to make an impact right now, and voting is one way we can each individually affect change for our collective community. [_**If you can, make a contribution today to support our Voter Education Fund.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17748784/205032461/1003843848?refcode=20200604_em_fr_KYprimary_all_l1_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdhZmNkMS05Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEd3x9bkR6bj4yQHhXui3DukseYrgkV1XOR_V3hvWXs=) We use this fund to cover the costs of phone calls, text messages, postcards, and digital ads to inform voters about the upcoming election. My team has compiled information on requesting an absentee ballot and voting safely in the primary:
* The State Board of Elections created the [_**GoVoteKY.com online portal**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17748785/205032462/198307927?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdhZmNkMS05Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEd3x9bkR6bj4yQHhXui3DukseYrgkV1XOR_V3hvWXs=&emci=dd7afcd1-9ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=de7afcd1-9ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662)for voters to request ballots.
* You must request an absentee ballot by June 15 and return it by June 23.
* In-person absentee voting will begin on June 8. All registered voters are encouraged to vote absentee by mail, but if that is not an option, please make an appointment and wear personal protective equipment (PPE). PPE will only be provided for county clerks and poll workers.

For more information, please visit _**[www.joshhicksforcongress.com/vote](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17748786/205032463/-928225557?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdhZmNkMS05Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEd3x9bkR6bj4yQHhXui3DukseYrgkV1XOR_V3hvWXs=&emci=dd7afcd1-9ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=de7afcd1-9ca6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=15601662)**_. _**[If you can support our voter outreach with a financial contribution, please contribute to our Voter Education Fund.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17748787/205032464/1003843848?refcode=20200604_em_fr_KYprimary_all_l2_atest&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZTdhZmNkMS05Y2E2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tEd3x9bkR6bj4yQHhXui3DukseYrgkV1XOR_V3hvWXs=)**_ Washington is a mess and we need new leadership to change that. Our team will help you stay informed, stay safe, and cast your vote in the June 23 primary. \-- Josh | |

clean_body: | "" | | There's never a dull day here on Team Conole as we are less than 20 (!) days from Election Day. Today's big update? A brand new ad is airing on Central New Yorkers' television sets -- focusing on our Trump-supporting opponent's failure to lead in these trying times for our nation. It 's important to us that you not only know about each new development in our campaign, but have the chance to invest in it. Will you add a donation to our Ads Fund so we can continue reaching key voters? | | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" | | "" We 've said it time and time again: paid advertising is going to be a huge part in deciding this election. Voters in NY-24 have ballots on their kitchen tables right now and are deciding who to cast their vote for -- so every moment is critical. Together, we can flip this district from red to blue, but only if Francis is our nominee. And with Donald Trump 's chances of winning still very possible, we need to expand our majority in the House. We need to show our opponents that our support is growing every day and that Iowa Democrats stick together. To celebrate our primary victories, I've teamed up with the three other Democrats running to represent Iowa in Congress -- **Cindy Axne, Abby Finkenauer and J.D. Scholten -- along with Theresa Greenfield** , our nominee to take on Joni Ernst to represent our state in the Senate. We all have tight races (ours is a toss-up!) so we need your help! **[That's 5 incredible chances to fight for health care, our children's education and an economy that works for everyone. name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Trump, HBCUs and Progress
body:
"The scale and duration of President Trump’s commitment to HBCUs is a story often ignored in the popular press, but it fits neatly within the..." | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a7aec8ff7b&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Trump, HBCUs and Progress**

“As both of us can attest, historically Black colleges and universities (HBCU) provide a vital path for young African-Americans to reach the true heights of their potential,” Ken Blackwell and Herman Cain write in _Townhall_.

“The scale and duration of President Trump’s commitment to HBCUs is a story often ignored in the popular press, but it fits neatly within the framework of his governing philosophy. This administration has the interests of all citizens at heart and is always trying to fund and support solutions that truly empower black Americans.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3a9bcd7aa7&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “Around the nation we are seeing police at the breaking point. They are showing restraint in the face of insane abuse . . . Thanks to the hysteria being stoked by the media and Democrats hoping for electoral advantage, police are being killed and injured and abused,” Miranda Devine writes in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=667df87380&e=3ee4985eea) _. _
---
|
---
| Former Deputy Attorney General Rod Rosenstein made a stunning admission yesterday about allegations that the Obama Administration spied on the Trump campaign. The moment came amid questions from Sen. Lindsey Graham (R-SC), who asked, “If you knew then what you know now, would you have signed the [FISA] warrant application?” Rosenstein’s answer: “No, I would not.” Read more from David Marcus in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=220a9eb771&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “In recent days we’ve heard a steady drumbeat of lies, distortions, and disingenuousness from the mainstream media about almost every aspect of the unrest now gripping American cities. The deceit is almost too pervasive and amorphous to describe,” John Daniel Davidson writes in [_The Federalist_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d1ff9f2ff1&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:** [“Did You Catch CNN's Deception During Trump's Rose Garden Address” ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f72fd6dc6a&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0ba0c57adb&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=41ce6b7d75&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=a230e8d089)
---

Friend,

We need your help. We have a HUGE surprise planned for President Trump, but we can’t pull it off without you.

The First Family wants to get a RECORD BREAKING 2 MILLION signatures from Patriots all across the Nations wishing the President a Happy Birthday.

When you sign the President’s ONLY Official Birthday Card, you can even leave a personal note for him to read.

Only 30 Patriots receive priority access to the President’s Birthday Card. If you sign in the NEXT HOUR, your name will be 1 of the 30 names he sees first.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cb2e427c36c78692afbcad5036661a34d4975f6821655de939faf193db3d59112c2eb115e70bc0a6a74b43d5a915116efaa8c2e4fadc750
Please add your name NOW to the President’s ONLY Official Birthday Card to make sure he sees your name. >>
http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cb2e427c36c78692afbcad5036661a34d4975f6821655de939faf193db3d59112c2eb115e70bc0a6a74b43d5a915116efaa8c2e4fadc750
We want to get 2 MILLION signatures to let President Trump know how thankful we are for his incredible leadership over this past year, but we can’t do it without you.

On June 14th, the President will read all the kind notes from his supporters, and we know he will be disappointed if you don’t leave him a birthday note.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cb2e427c36c78692afbcad5036661a34d4975f6821655de939faf193db3d59112c2eb115e70bc0a6a74b43d5a915116efaa8c2e4fadc750
Please add your name IMMEDIATELY to President Trump’s ONLY Official Birthday Card before June 14th to wish President Trump a very Happy Birthday. >>

Thank you,

Team Trump 2020

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=8cb2e427c36c78692afbcad5036661a34d4975f6821655de939faf193db3d59112c2eb115e70bc0a6a74b43d5a915116efaa8c2e4fadc750

You are receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com

Trump Make America Great Again Committee, 138 Conant Street, 2nd Floor, Beverly, MA 01915

We believe this is an important way to reach our grassroots supporters with the most up-to-date information regarding the efforts of the Trump Make America Great Again Committee and President Trump, and we’re glad you’re on our team. It’s because of grassroots supporters like you that we will Make America Great Again, and we appreciate your support. Thank you for all that you do!

name: Tom Cotton
subject: The Liberal Mob Comes for Tom Cotton
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
The left is going in OVERTIME to try to get me to apologize and back down. Guess what? It is not happening. I do not care how angry the liberal mob gets--I'm going to stand up for what's right. Even now, thousands of angry liberals are threatening me and are working to get me out of office. I want to know if you have my back.
Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42657181&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=6&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,

Yesterday, I made the argument in the New York Times that these riots need to end NOW. You can read my editorial [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=11&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0).

Peaceful protests should be celebrated, but those who are burning down stores, looting, and shooting police officers deserve to be locked up and thrown in prison for years.

And if needed, our military can provide backup to our brave law enforcement officers. It is more important to protect the security of the American people than it is to be politically correct.

Now, radical leftists like AOC are trying to censor me.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=16&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

And even journalists--who are supposed to be non-partisan--have launched a campaign to silence me.

**[SIGN HERE TOM COTTON IS RIGHT: WE NEED TO END THE RIOTS NOW](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

Where was their outrage when rioters and criminals burned down hundreds of stores, beat store owners, and dragged people out of their cars?

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

The left is going in OVERTIME to try to get me to apologize and back down.

Guess what? It is not happening. I do not care how angry the liberal mob gets--I'm going to stand up for what's right.

Even now, thousands of angry liberals are threatening me and are working to get me out of office.

I want to know if you have my back.

Do you agree with me that I should not back down? If so, I am asking you to let me know now. Please, **[sign my petition](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=19&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0):**

**[SIGN HERE TOM COTTON IS RIGHT: WE NEED TO END THE RIOTS NOW](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=20&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)**

I'm willing to fight back and I can take some heat. But I can tell you that it means the world to know that you've got my back.

Let's put security first and stop letting political correctness censor what's right.

In service,

Tom Cotton
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
| | | | | | Paid for by Cotton for Senate
---

2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

_Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch._

[Privacy Policy](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTcxODES1&kn=1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[Unsubscribe](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42657181&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDMzODcxMwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Helen=20VanEtten?=
subject: Why I support Jake LaTurner
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
He is the only person running for Congress in the 2nd district that has what it takes to keep this seat from falling into the hands of the Democrats. | |
---
| | | Friends,

As many of you know, I have spent the last 12 years serving as the Republican National Committeewoman. My time in that role is coming to an end, but separate from that, as a Kansan who has always cared deeply about my state and the elected leaders we choose to represent us, _I wanted you all to know that I have decided to support Jake LaTurner in his run for Congress._

The Democratic candidate for the 2nd congressional district is very likely to be the current mayor of Topeka. I know her well, and she will be an extremely tough candidate to beat. Jake's record as a conservative Republican is irrefutable, and _we must have a strong candidate from the GOP to put up against this strong Democratic nominee._ To lose another House seat in Kansas would be devastating.

Jake is the only person running for Congress in the 2nd district that has what it takes to keep this seat from falling into the hands of the Democrats. I have seen many candidates run for office, and I assure you he has what it takes to win.

Jake is a lifelong Kansan and has spent many years working on behalf of the people of Kansas, both during his two terms as a state Senator and his time as Kansas State Treasurer. I know Jake to be a man who is honest and trustworthy. He will take the lead on issues that matter to our state and work hard to get the job done. Jake won the pro-life hero award from Kansans for Life, he introduced and passed a property tax lid to help struggling Kansans. _I know he will have President Trump's back in Washington._ I hope you will join me and the many others who have chosen to support Jake LaTurner as the best candidate from our party to win in August. The primary is just a couple of months away and we need your help spreading the word.

Let's send a trusted conservative to Washington, D.C.!

[You can help support Jake's campaign by donating at this link.](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=7d5e96558d&e=1050d051da)

Sincerely,

Helen VanEtten

name: Claudia Tenney
subject: No career politicians. No joke.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claudia for Congress |
body:
It’s time for term limits in Washington. That’s why I pledged to cosponsor the amendment that’s going to make it happen [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79c794cdbf2b4454afb6254ffb0add40&_e=_hj1GMGFc32n6v3E8PJVK2velWzMvGe3ZpE1OUBE7iEJ6vnt3OR_RJDqa2zuO4JrOudVfMA_lPo5j4cTLuzD1cjCVZ9uk8j96U76Ym-KjiBB6sYYyyv-3EKWAC53MKuD7eVOU3pGNcH6J2e7shh_o58HEfVXwiQbBZ9xSKcGsgkBqXVPo3Tn1pUbr0xWpSkcJNu7zJjtZbA379lVbEU1_pHEVAGuPqD1sF0xH4HSkXlH3ALaWL9nX5mYykV3DsTqtvI3UrhgY_S3Sh4Ye_r8N03Ssco9p8zM8Rxn6F9fPUmwPIVzjF1VB2Io0sJRE6sCuhkiFYSVl9vOI3nNXg7B25APZMMLjCtFXxpTlCyZsUPmjlKCBWpbJLqq5Bs8SINVouMrnbzc8DAcsDJb-SLAoYDa9w9kNgJ5eslFcrOZSm87zoWG3ZOe5N5cPzAtbdKZpa4mlXcATyhIoEpULwV6UhdzbLi6GfnFVuEXmaLB0XY%3D) _**Career Politicians: Your Days in Washington are Numbered!**_ **[STAND WITH ME: DEMAND TERM LIMITS>>>](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79c794cdbf2b4454afb6254ffb0add40&_e=_hj1GMGFc32n6v3E8PJVK2velWzMvGe3ZpE1OUBE7iEJ6vnt3OR_RJDqa2zuO4JrOudVfMA_lPo5j4cTLuzD1cjCVZ9uk8j96U76Ym-KjiBB6sYYyyv-3EKWAC53MKuD7eVOU3pGNcH6J2e7shh_o58HEfVXwiQbBZ9xSKcGsgkBqXVPo3Tn1pUbr0xWpSkcJNu7zJjtZbA379lVbEU1_pHEVAGuPqD1sF0xH4HSkXlH3ALaWL9nX5mYykV3DsTqtvI3UrhgY_S3Sh4Ye_r8N5U1ZqCmTLXED1OBtnqoSKhtq1xr3hoz-dzwq3K1ynBkHIveEDTHIBMF0z5PaVTQ4tUS7CWWCq5A71l5HCDhfmGzc5Wv1EkXn_oXljAavPDLAEDaJhx7pn6JFMf6to8oNLP2ORfjLYnMuLdpvLEIUh7TaAH1GwW4pW-DffZ9rGlK06lu3Q8ch-EnR37p_CGhMT80s7KCiuSi8lhXJQMYmls%3D)** Friend, let’s imagine a Congress with term limits in place:
_Nancy Pelosi would’ve left D.C. in 1995._ _Maxine Waters would’ve left D.C. in 1996_ _Chuck Schumer would’ve left D.C. in 2011_
It’s time to tell the career politicians “you can’t serve forever!”
Americans want citizen-leaders, who get things done. That’s why I support term limits on Congress – for the people, by the people!
**That’s not a promise I take lightly.**
NY-22 gets enough empty promises from Anthony Brindisi. I’m running to change that, but I’m not going to stop there. I’m running to provide families and workers in our district with **long-lasting solutions** that won’t disappear with me the day I leave office. [**ADD YOUR NAME: IT'S TIME FOR TERM LIMITS**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79c794cdbf2b4454afb6254ffb0add40&_e=_hj1GMGFc32n6v3E8PJVK2velWzMvGe3ZpE1OUBE7iEJ6vnt3OR_RJDqa2zuO4JrOudVfMA_lPo5j4cTLuzD1cjCVZ9uk8j96U76Ym-KjiBB6sYYyyv-3EKWAC53MKuD7eVOU3pGNcH6J2e7shh_o58HEfVXwiQbBZ9xSKcGsgkBqXVPo3Tn1pUbr0xWpSkcJNu7zJjtZbA379lVbEU1_pHEVAGuPqD1sF0xH4HSkXlH3ALaWL9nX5mYykV3DsTqtvI3UrhgY_S3Sh4Ye_r8N22k-L7IESM51g1yEFDo4r7fTY0BO5A7HmG5E6WT5nzOBNsKLKQox57uacUDNesgezy8to1JWi7Pew9Rx6LCxVC89bQa_WsBhYJDm9jA4X_zi_2X_fTaBMyLWjtU79sc8VQf7BcRSWlg_pkW2yr-oC_rE8gC_9gSF31CTXROTp1ih8yP1j-3-7eMul65BMY7Yl5kifTlD8eoygJRsfLkLok%3D) With these guardrails in place, we will finally be able to expect a Congress that serves America’s interests instead of its own interests – and so will our children and grandchildren.
Term limits won’t benefit Republicans or Democrats. **Term limits will benefit Americans** – and I’ll fight to make sure it happens as soon as I’m back in Washington. [**ADD YOUR NAME: IT'S TIME FOR TERM LIMITS**](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=79c794cdbf2b4454afb6254ffb0add40&_e=_hj1GMGFc32n6v3E8PJVK2velWzMvGe3ZpE1OUBE7iEJ6vnt3OR_RJDqa2zuO4JrOudVfMA_lPo5j4cTLuzD1cjCVZ9uk8j96U76Ym-KjiBB6sYYyyv-3EKWAC53MKuD7eVOU3pGNcH6J2e7shh_o58HEfVXwiQbBZ9xSKcGsgkBqXVPo3Tn1pUbr0xWpSkcJNu7zJjtZbA379lVbEU1_pHEVAGuPqD1sF0xH4HSkXlH3ALaWL9nX5mYykV3DsTqtvI3UrhgY_S3Sh4Ye_r8Ny-Fm3cQNSgBaalIC6tqDUbJBgzNfHg5nl8VfZ6hvEGDphjCiPx-3GjaEioz8Y-fBApZpNqoeS_za94_W37bOzkQ0hLoDb5SV10dKQ6PBR47oYmB5Nkn-mwKx0-VT7saPDuPTHhroRKajCfGWhK-KNiQAQUkz-dD3E-DREPH5tl_5HuWtwvNFtSgI1c19IXVfL-zS0MZAuacY_oMopBnYkA%3D) Thank you for fighting with me, Claudia Tenney |

**Now polls are showing how beatable John Cornyn is in Texas. We don't have any time to lose, y'all. The moment MJ wins the runoff, we need to IMMEDIATELY take the fight to Sen. Cornyn.

[So we're announcing a $100,000 goal -- our most ambitious goal EVER! Pitch in right now to make sure this campaign is prepared to take on and DEFEAT Sen. Cornyn, Mitch McConnell's right-hand man.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890014/7f51f7bc/4e349943/4ef682d9/1715388880/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE1MTYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-defeatc?refcode=email_20200604.1nd__1516__&amount=10")**

Please visit our to find ways you can individually take action to support frontline responders and keep our family safe. ICYMI: June Survey! Friend -- in case you didn’t already see it, we wanted to send you our one-click survey again to hear what issues are on your mind. Can you take a moment to respond to our one-click poll below to share your thoughts with the campaign? Friend, our monthly survey makes sure that our campaign best serves the needs of our community. We’re not interested in media narratives or corporate money defining the issues our campaign is running on -- we’re interested in what you care about. So if you can, please fill out our one-click poll below; your feedback helps our campaign meet the changing needs of our district. Thank you, -Team Sri June 2020 One-Click Survey What is the number one issue on your mind? | = = = = = = | Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington. | = Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at | Paid for by Sri for Congress SRI FOR CONGRESS P.O. BOX 898 SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please .

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: Reimagining your government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
a few examples that Governor Holcomb provided yesterday on how we’re
reimagining your state government

<>
Friends,

If you’ve been listening to Governor Holcomb for long, you know that “great
government service” is one of his five fundamental governing principles.

And today, he discussed how – because of COVID-19 – we’re not just providing
great government service, butwe’re continuing to reimagine the way we’re
serving Hoosiers as we get Indiana’s economy back on track.

Here are just a few examples that Governor Holcomb provided yesterday on how
we’re reimagining your state government –

1.) Broadband Internet for Rural Indiana

Governor Holcomb is leading Indiana's largest single state investment in
broadband in our state's history – announcing a $100 million phased investment
in 2018.

Here’s a map of broadband investments made just last year:
<>
And now during a pandemic, it’s more important than ever to make sure we’re
all connected.That’s why in July we’ll be announcing the next round of
broadband funding, with 72 applications received in 47 counties. Stay tuned!

2.) Help for Hoosier Small Businesses

We all know that small businesses are the backbone of Indiana’s economy. And
that’s why Indiana is launching a new phase of the COVID-19 Response Program to
help those small businesses who have been hit hard by the pandemic.
<>
Local governments can apply for up to $250,000 in funding, and then use that
funding to provide either grants or loans of up to $25,000 to small businesses
that keep their employees working. If you’re a community interested in applying
for this funding stream, contact the Indiana Office of Community and Rural
Affairs at info@ocra.in.gov.

3.) Helping Hoosiers With Healthcare Expenses
More big news today! Indiana has received a waiver for a first-in-the-nation
program that’s helping Hoosiers transition from Indiana’s Healthy Indiana Plan
(HIP) to private insurance, without experiencing a gap in coverage.
<>
This newly-approved program allows Hoosiers transitioning out of HIP access to
up to $1,000 from their POWER account for up to 12 months to pay premiums,
deductibles, copayments and coinsurance during their transition to commercial
coverage. This will provide critical assistance as HIP members skill-up and
continue to pursue meaningful employment.

As you can see, Governor Holcomb is committed to providing great government
service to Hoosiers – now, and always.

#BackOnTrack,
-Your Holcomb Crew

Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana. © Copyright 2020. All rights reserved.

Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN
46204 | (317) 569-0709

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe
<http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=30dcadf290424ae78d3b2f89c73e18c9&_t=zBP6gEbr-LscetE0ERusarcZxJa6QoEgsHpV10D4H7WxmTqmF-U3JMQPg_cXtcrgOOFt9BJtJbiYmnxxoZ1A7eCGEVpQLi96n74LGC2QJyvB68c8yfFqjzcTJpuSlUAy2X571cggXkXeTFGrZbVv40Thao4ZXX7_3-nGGGNzelw%3D>

| **Jackie Walorski:
Grateful to President Trump**
---
|

| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=45e9fe3195&e=5886ca081d)

| Dear Friend,

You may have missed that on Election Day. Donald Trump endorsed Jackie Walorski, stating Jackie “is doing an incredible job for Indiana.” Jackie then tweeted proudly that she is grateful to receive Donald Trump’s “complete and total endorsement.”
---
| [ENDORSE PAT WITH A DONATION >>](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b6fe707483&e=5886ca081d "ENDORSE PAT WITH A DONATION >>")
---
| Yesterday, just one day after Jackie proudly accepted Trump’s endorsement and on the heels of our primary election here in Indiana, Former Secretary of Defense James Mattis said the following:
> “Donald Trump is the first president in my lifetime who does not try to unite the American people– does not even pretend to try. Instead, he tries to divide us... We must reject and hold accountable those in office who would make a mockery of our Constitution.”
Additionally, retired four-star Marine Corps General John Allen said that Donald Trump’s recent threat to use the military on protestors “...may well signal the beginning of the end of the American experiment."

This is a grave and serious moment in our nation. Jackie does not recognize this. She does not understand her duty as a congresswoman, nor is she up to the task of the response required by Congress. [**Jackie Walorski’s uncritical allegiance to Donald Trump is alarming.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=a88ff6f817&e=5886ca081d)

**We need new representation. **

[**We need a representative who will serve the people of this district and our Constitution. Pat will be that representative.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3514cb4808&e=5886ca081d)
---
| [JOIN OUR EFFORTS >>](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=b56b7fc13b&e=5886ca081d "JOIN OUR EFFORTS >>")

Please join our efforts, and contribute to this campaign. Thank you.

\-- Team Hackett

name: Dr. Woody Myers for Governor
subject: Making sure you saw this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Myers for Governor
body:
Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6bdb0eb7-a5a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/c8a6305c-b4a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE2MzA1Yy1iNGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyPeExl0xVPbwLKarcSkbeu0IBxNkAWCgYCcBAK05i4=&id=123192508 .

Peter,

We just wanted to make sure you saw this message: Dr. Woody Myers is officially the Democratic nominee for Governor of Indiana!

Our state is facing unprecedented challenges right now. One crucial way to make a change for the better is to elect a leading health expert, physician, and small business owner as the first Black governor in Indiana’s history. As Governor, Woody will address systemic barriers that have long held Hoosiers back from economic and social justice.

You can be a part of that change. Will you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can today?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=20200604_f_1__fl&amount=25

Thank you so much for all that you do,

Team Woody

---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Dr. Woody Myers
Date: June 3rd, 2020 6:20 PM
Subject: It’s official

Peter,

It’s official. Yesterday, I became the Democratic nominee for Governor of Indiana.

And I couldn’t have done it without you.

Thank you for joining me in this historic election. Not only are we living and campaigning in one of the worst public health and economic crises in history, and during a time of social upheaval, but in yesterday’s primary, you helped get me that much closer to being the first African American governor in Indiana’s history.

I’m running for Governor of Indiana because I owe it to those who worked and sacrificed so that I could receive a high-quality public education, have a good quality of life, and serve my community. As Governor, I will give back to the state that has given me so much.

I want to change Indiana, and our nation, for the better. I want us to use science and public health principles to make good decisions related to COVID-19, rectify health disparities, clean up our environment, and tear down barriers to long life for all, irrespective of race, religion, gender, or sexual orientation. I want Indiana to confront its past and work together for our future.

As Governor, I’ll use my life experiences as a third-generation Hoosier, physician, former Indiana Health Commissioner, small business owner, father, and grandfather to make Indiana better than we’ve been. And everything we can be.

The road ahead will be difficult. It will take a lot of work to take down the Pence-Holcomb dynasty, but it’s worth it to fight for policies that help working families, especially now.

Let’s build the future we deserve... together.

I need you with me. Today, can you pitch in $10, $25, or whatever you can to make sure we have the resources we need to win in November?

>>> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=20200604_f_1__fl&amount=25

I know what Hoosiers are made of. Out on the campaign trail, I’ve seen your compassion. I’ve felt your commitment. I’ve witnessed your determination to fight for a better life... an economy that works for you, for your families, for your neighbors and friends. A community that supports the downtrodden, those left behind, and those who need to know that they are not alone.

So let’s get to work; we can’t afford to wait.

Dr. Woody Myers, (Official) Democratic Nominee for Governor of Indiana

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=20200604_f_1__fl&amount=25]

Paid for by Myers for Governor
PO Box 1903
Indianapolis, IN 46206
United States
This message was sent to your email address

Dr. Woody Myers is running to be Governor of Indiana because he knows our state needs new leadership where people are first - not politics. As Governor, Woody will use his background in business and in medicine to guarantee all Hoosiers can access high-quality health care at an affordable cost, bring more good-paying jobs that can’t be shipped overseas to Indiana and provide every Hoosier child with a world-class public education.

Woody is running a grassroots campaign, which means our success is fueled by supporters like you. Please consider making a contribution to Myers for Governor today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/myers-default?refcode=footer-textlink]

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/6bdb0eb7-a5a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74/c8a6305c-b4a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTg3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjOGE2MzA1Yy1iNGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yyPeExl0xVPbwLKarcSkbeu0IBxNkAWCgYCcBAK05i4=&id=123192508 .

body:
Watch the full clip and see some of the behind the scenes pictures.

http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg55wCj&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3b03a19f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_04_04_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3b03a19f6d-68212193 Share (http://www.facebook.com/sharer/sharer.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Feepurl.com%2Fg55wCj&utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3b03a19f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_04_04_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3b03a19f6d-68212193)

http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3b03a19f6d&e=f6564bbe3b Forward to Friend (http://us18.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=d009170fb4604b5974b5521bd&id=3b03a19f6d&e=f6564bbe3b)
My Exclusive Interview with President Trump

https://youtu.be/UDnIJb_J9mI?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3b03a19f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_04_04_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3b03a19f6d-68212193
Check out the full interview with President Trump here. (https://youtu.be/UDnIJb_J9mI?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3b03a19f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_04_04_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3b03a19f6d-68212193)

Don't miss it, President Trump and I discussed everything from the killing of George Floyd and the riots to his toughest negotiations. I also asked President Trump about sanctions on China, his most recent Executive Order on Section 230 dealing with social media platforms, and the latest on social distancing and coronavirus. We talked about the media treatment of First Lady Melania Trump and her influence on him, as well as what he thinks his father would think of him becoming president.

Click here to watch it now, and make sure to subscribe to see all the interviews. (https://youtu.be/UDnIJb_J9mI?utm_source=RigWil+LLC&utm_campaign=3b03a19f6d-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2020_06_04_04_19&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_e2c241b9e7-3b03a19f6d-68212193)

Thanks,

Sean
