name: Kathy Landing for Congress
subject: Five Day to Go
body:
| | | | It’s hard to believe that it’s been a year since we launched this campaign and that we are less than a week away from Election Day...
---
---
Email not displaying correctly? [View it](https://sg-mktg.) in your browser.
---
Dear Lowcountry Neighbors, **We are exactly 5 days away from the Republican Primary!** And, we couldn't be more excited! While it's hard to believe that it's been a year since we launched this campaign and that we are less than a week away from Election Day, we quickly acknowledge how incredible a year it has been - _building the powerful momentum we now have heading into the final stretch._ So many miles traveled across the district. So many incredible neighbors met. So many events sharing my story and my conservative platform. So many patriots volunteering time, talent, and treasure. And, so many _[proven Lowcountry leaders publicly endorsing our campaign](https://www.kathylanding.com/endorsements)._ Now, with only 5 days to go, I have a simple request to ensure our campaign's success on Tuesday: **_Please call, text, and/or email 5 family members or friends_** in the Lowcountry and encourage them to vote Kathy Landing for Congress on Tuesday! I thank you in advance for your continued support and your time contacting 5 friends and family members! On to Victory,
---
---
| Kathy Landing Conservative Republican for Congress
---
P. S. - If you can chip in $5 now, it will ensure we have the resources necessary to finish the campaign as strong as possible. _[To donate $5 or more, please click here.](https://secure.anedot.com/kathy-landing-for-congress/c7c9812210464ad2f9124) Thank you again!_

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751353/205097744/-940294256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) Hi there,

Across the country, campaigns, ours included, are shifting to the new reality of campaigning in 2020. We’re adjusting our plans as necessary and pivoting everywhere we can.

**[That’s why we’ve got a quick question for you: are you planning to vote by mail this year?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751354/205097745/450950763?contactdata=92L9p7lvSn6IH1m%2Fek3s76I9%2BukbAbEnqGU5U8Qq1X1jcVUtcP6Ljq%2FTThTME%2Fj2mxKQ39N7fxqJcbtEKSHBVnVMKPc2PJ6iJGdj72VliB09Dd3sRtZPY8U%2FPFcQh1TuYECxqYTvStMT1KE4KdC2FQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)** | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751355/205097746/450950763?contactdata=92L9p7lvSn6IH1m%2Fek3s76I9%2BukbAbEnqGU5U8Qq1X1jcVUtcP6Ljq%2FTThTME%2Fj2mxKQ39N7fxqJcbtEKSHBVnVMKPc2PJ6iJGdj72VliB09Dd3sRtZPY8U%2FPFcQh1TuYECxqYTvStMT1KE4KdC2FQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644) | [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751356/205097747/450950763?contactdata=92L9p7lvSn6IH1m%2Fek3s76I9%2BukbAbEnqGU5U8Qq1X1jcVUtcP6Ljq%2FTThTME%2Fj2mxKQ39N7fxqJcbtEKSHBVnVMKPc2PJ6iJGdj72VliB09Dd3sRtZPY8U%2FPFcQh1TuYECxqYTvStMT1KE4KdC2FQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)
---|---

Across the country, people will cast their ballots from their kitchen tables instead of voting booths.

And we know that so many Floridians have already requested the mail-in ballots to help keep our communities safe, while still ensuring their voice is heard.

**[As we continue to plan for the fall, information like this will be incredibly useful, so we appreciate your response.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751357/205097748/450950763?contactdata=92L9p7lvSn6IH1m%2Fek3s76I9%2BukbAbEnqGU5U8Qq1X1jcVUtcP6Ljq%2FTThTME%2Fj2mxKQ39N7fxqJcbtEKSHBVnVMKPc2PJ6iJGdj72VliB09Dd3sRtZPY8U%2FPFcQh1TuYECxqYTvStMT1KE4KdC2FQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

Thank you for your input!

Team Good
| Margaret Good is a lawyer, runner, and state representative running in FL-16 to change the face of Southwest Florida, and we are so proud to have you on our team. Margaret is a strong voice for our values—she brings an incredible work ethic and common sense to her fight for working families, to protect Florida’s fragile environment, for accessible and affordable healthcare, and against the special interests that have hijacked our political process. _We need to send her to Congress to continue fighting for us._

Email is the best way for us to keep you informed about what’s happening with the campaign, and we are excited to have your support! You may notice that we send a lot of emails asking for your support—that’s because we win when everyone does what they can to help. Our campaign has taken a pledge to reject corporate PAC money and is instead funded by thousands of actual people who care about our democracy and want to see positive change in our community and across our country. **[If you'd like to donate, click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751358/205097749/788213855?refcode=emfooter&amount=25&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=)**

If you’d like to volunteer, **[click here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17751359/205097750/192916899?contactdata=92L9p7lvSn6IH1m%2Fek3s76I9%2BukbAbEnqGU5U8Qq1X1jcVUtcP6Ljq%2FTThTME%2Fj2mxKQ39N7fxqJcbtEKSHBVnVMKPc2PJ6iJGdj72VliB09Dd3sRtZPY8U%2FPFcQh1TuYECxqYTvStMT1KE4KdC2FQ%3D%3D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODIwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYWM1NmFmOC1iOGE2LWVhMTEtOWIwNS0wMDE1NWQwMzllNzQiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GqESwfDAsogNzM27ZgH5i92aVOyJi5fWDRX1IfFWbPc=&emci=fea94753-7fa6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&emdi=3ac56af8-b8a6-ea11-9b05-00155d039e74&ceid=9814644)**

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: Make China Pay
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jCKaMGpnUS18jjb35D7Qxqeu2hftax5PHUPIa3juYdcsnvPYLwkSaW6c5Ugk0Wn4SrSgyGw8N-SMN6kWqh_YNaFn8Q_GegVHM_WCpjPXy4kzM1MeCiwWhLCaQlojVwHrkzTlKAljJGCQLWTC4hOK_AVsvxj3SC8KkCc1DwK_2If8zwAOJHgq0w==&c=ZaNEGUnN6GWtIbjs1wMTw8L0BX-g9ETTfuM_yk2MPvsoepPyBYs4Gg==&ch=rEpR1afvCHAERiy_4gl6kzZCHlXm2MqPVp5alX99H-4Urqph1NJDdA==)
---
| Patriot,
It's time for some tough talk with China. The coronavirus has wreaked havoc across our country, killing over 100,000 Americans and causing us to shut down nearly the entire economy.
Now that we know China lied about multiple aspects of the coronavirus and used the World Health Organization to cover, we need to hold them accountable.
It's past time that we have a Congress that stands up to the Communist Party of China. For decades they have taken advantage of the United States. I say: enough is enough.
If you want to see a Congress that will be tough on China, [I need you to chip in and show your support today](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jCKaMGpnUS18jjb35D7Qxqeu2hftax5PHUPIa3juYdcsnvPYLwkSaW6c5Ugk0Wn4SrSgyGw8N-SMN6kWqh_YNaFn8Q_GegVHM_WCpjPXy4kzM1MeCiwWhLCaQlojVwHrkzTlKAljJGCQLWTC4hOK_AVsvxj3SC8KkCc1DwK_2If8zwAOJHgq0w==&c=ZaNEGUnN6GWtIbjs1wMTw8L0BX-g9ETTfuM_yk2MPvsoepPyBYs4Gg==&ch=rEpR1afvCHAERiy_4gl6kzZCHlXm2MqPVp5alX99H-4Urqph1NJDdA==). I am not afraid to take on China, and I want to see America lessen our dependence on them.
---
| | | [HOLD CHINA ACCOUNTABLE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001jCKaMGpnUS18jjb35D7Qxqeu2hftax5PHUPIa3juYdcsnvPYLwkSaW6c5Ugk0Wn4SrSgyGw8N-SMN6kWqh_YNaFn8Q_GegVHM_WCpjPXy4kzM1MeCiwWhLCaQlojVwHrkzTlKAljJGCQLWTC4hOK_AVsvxj3SC8KkCc1DwK_2If8zwAOJHgq0w==&c=ZaNEGUnN6GWtIbjs1wMTw8L0BX-g9ETTfuM_yk2MPvsoepPyBYs4Gg==&ch=rEpR1afvCHAERiy_4gl6kzZCHlXm2MqPVp5alX99H-4Urqph1NJDdA==)
---
| The truth is, too many people in Washington do not have the guts to stand up to the Communist Party of China. But I work for you, the American people, and I don't take my job lightly.

The coronavirus has wreaked havoc across our country, killing over 100,000 Americans and causing us to shut down nearly the entire economy. Now that we know China lied about multiple aspects of the coronavirus and used the World Health Organization to cover, we need to hold them accountable. It's past time that we have a Congress that stands up to the Communist Party of China. For decades they have taken advantage of the United States. I say: enough is enough. name: Senator Chris Van Hollen
subject: Black Lives Matter
body:
| | | [Click here to open this e-mail in its own browser window](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?link=SenVanHollen%2501144454%2501100460%2b-%2b06-04-2020%2beNewsletter%250115660.17560365.4629879.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501) | [Click here to open a plain text version of this email](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//view_newsletter_setup.aspx?plain_text=Y&link=SenVanHollen%2501144454%2501100460%2b-%2b06-04-2020%2beNewsletter%250115660.17560365.4629879.7517223%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Friend%2501dpwillis67%2540gmail.com%2501Silver%2bSpring%252c%2bMD%2b20906%2501)
---|---
| | | **June 4, 2020** |
---|---|---|---
| | | We are at a pivotal point in our country. It's a moment of reckoning. Future generations will carefully examine this moment to see how we responded - to see which path our nation took and what role each and every American played.

Many Americans are taking to the streets - protesting and showing their pain, their frustration, their anger.

I stood and knelt with those protesters yesterday at the Capitol, as they delivered a clear message for real, immediate change. We must bring that call for action from outside the Senate walls [onto the Senate floor](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f182768239759532%2f&redir_log=651229093045397) to drive change. We need to match their demands for justice by passing laws for police accountability and to root out systemic racism in all its forms because **Black Lives Matter**.

While the immediate spark for this moment was the brutal murder of George Floyd, his killing was not an isolated event. It is not the first time a black man has called out "I can't breathe" as he was choked or lynched. We can draw a straight line that runs from slavery, to Jim Crow, to legal segregation, to de facto segregation, to institutional racism, to the killings of so many in recent years - George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Freddie Gray, Michael Brown, Tamir Rice, Eric Garner, Trayvon Martin, Ahmaud Arbery, and others.

**Every one of these individuals deserves justice. As do so many more.**

Today, as Minneapolis mourns the loss of George Floyd at his memorial service, we must consider how we got here. The white police officer who looked at the camera as he kept his knee on the neck of George Floyd for 8 minutes and 46 seconds thought he would get away with his actions because he and so many others had not been held accountable before - the three officers who aided and abetted in the murder felt the same. They thought they could get away with what they did based on their previous experiences. **We must change that.**

This is a moment that demands real action, real change, and real results - starting with changes in police practices and the systemic racism and institutional biases that have shielded those who engaged in misconduct from accountability.

**There are changes we can make today.**

We should begin by establishing truly independent oversight mechanisms to ensure that those police officers who betray the public trust are held accountable. We must ban outright the use of chokeholds unless the officer's life is in imminent danger and use federal leverage to incentivize de-escalatory practices over escalatory ones. We need national standards backed up by real consequences for those who do not comply. And we must establish a federal data bank that tracks reports of police misconduct - not only unjustified killings by police, but all forms of misconduct. These changes are required to protect our citizens, our communities, and those police who are doing their jobs. Bad cops - and broken systems - are bad for good cops.

While the murder of George Floyd and others has again exposed the need for fundamental changes in police accountability, it also cries out for systemic change to address racism embedded in other institutions. The need for additional change does not mean that we have not made progress in our country on key issues of civil rights and political rights - but it does mean that we have a very long, unfinished road ahead to achieve the promise of equal justice, equal rights, and equal opportunity in America.

George Floyd's murder comes in the middle of a pandemic that has inflicted disproportionate harm on communities of color, especially the black community, because of deep underlying disparities in our society. COVID-19 has shone a harsh light on inequality in our economic, health care, and education systems. The reality is we must put all of our institutions under the microscope and very intentionally root out racial bias and discriminatory impact.

The protests taking place in Baltimore City and counties across Maryland, D.C., Minneapolis and in every state in our country are an expression of the deep hurt and frustration caused by the continued death toll and other harms resulting from our failure as a nation to address the underlying inequities in our society and among our citizens.

I fully support these peaceful protests. I stand by Marylanders expressing this pain and this anger. And I was disgusted to see President Trump disrupt one of these peaceful protests - using tear gas and rubber bullets - to clear the way for his own personal photo-op in front of St. John's Episcopal Church. These are actions taken by dictators - not by the President of the United States. The President grossly violated Americans' First Amendment rights, and we must use all our powers under the Constitution to hold him accountable.

**We have much work ahead to build a more perfect union, but that cause is righteous, and we must act with urgency and determination to live up to the promise of equal justice, equal rights, and equal opportunity for all. That is my pledge. **
Chris Van Hollen

Earlier this week, I spoke out on the Senate floor on the murder of George Floyd and the urgent need for action to eliminate systemic racism in all its ugly forms - [watch here](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2fvideos%2f182768239759532%2f&redir_log=651229093045397).
---
[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=Facebook&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.facebook.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=328155479639284 "Facebook")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=Twitter&redirect=https%3a%2f%2ftwitter.com%2fChrisVanHollen&redir_log=957640916473241 "Twitter")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=Instagram&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.instagram.com%2fchrisvanhollen%2f&redir_log=389295287187292 "Instagram")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=YouTube&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fwww.youtube.com%2fuser%2fRepChrisVanHollen&redir_log=463627374976326 "YouTube")[](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet/iqClickTrk.aspx?&cid=SenVanHollen&crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223&report_id=&redirect=https%3a%2f%2fmedium.com%2f%40ChrisVanHollen&redir_log=575666539451239)
|
---
[Please click here to unsubscribe](https://outreach.senate.gov/iqextranet//EsurveyForm.aspx?__cid=SenVanHollen&__sid=100007&__crop=15660.17560365.4629879.7517223)

name: Susan Collins
subject: My urgent response strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
The Far Left's new massive attack has hit Maine's airwaves. And while my grassroots movement has helped me prepare for it, we still do not have enough resources to properly fight back.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=17&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Peter,
The Far Left's new massive attack has hit Maine's airwaves. And while my grassroots movement has helped me prepare for it, we still do not have enough resources to properly fight back.
On Monday, a **$2 million dollar ad buy** dropped spreading more lies about me in Maine. Last week, I asked you to help me get ahead of this. Today, I need your support to stop the lies in their tracks.
To put things in perspective, this attack has enough funding to saturate Maine's airwaves for months on end. My campaign has yet to see an attack of this magnitude, and they are only getting worse.
When the Far Left invests this kind of money to spread misinformation across Maine, it is our responsibility to respond fast and forcefully. [**So I must ask you this: Can you please chip into my Urgent Response Fund today?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=4&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0) The only way I can stop Chuck Schumer and the Far Left from spreading these lies is with your support. Please help me fight back and contribute any amount that you can afford.
[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=18&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=8&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=7&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=15&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---

[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=13&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
The key to winning this November is responding to these attacks with urgency. We cannot allow the Far Left to remain on air with these blatant lies. We have no choice but to fight back. [**Please help my campaign execute our response strategy and set the record straight.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?ms=NDI2NTk3NjMS1&kn=14&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc4MDM1MzY3NAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Thank you. I need you more than ever,
Susan

It would mean a lot if you could make a donation to our campaign tonight so we can expand our communication to key voters. So please, read our message below, and chip in at this link before midnight tonight: "" \--Francis There's never a dull day here on Team Conole as we are less than 20 (!) days from Election Day. body:
You are receiving this email from 314 Action Fund because you've previously expressed interest in our efforts. If you'd rather not get all of our updates you can [click here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7579/4bd7760e/5d2fd467/77ae7cbb/369877827/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/less-email/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&refcode=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval") for only the most important emails, or you can click [here](https://act.314actionfund.org/page/m/29bb7579/4bd7760e/5d2fd467/77ae7cba/369877827/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZQUWtaVlUwTkJWRVZFVWtWRFNWQkpSVTVVU1VRbEpRPT0iOiI1ZDJmZDQ2NyIsIkpTVlBRa1pWVTBOQlZFVkVUVUZKVEVsT1IxTkZUa1JKUkNVbCI6IjI5YmI3NTc5In0%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://act.314actionfund.org/page/oneclickunsubscribe/5d2fd467/29bb7579?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&refcode=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval") to unsubscribe.
| Do you approve of President Trump? | America is at a crossroads. We need empathetic, steady leadership now more than ever.

**_We are getting the exact opposite from President Trump._**

We need to know: [Do you approve of President Trump?](https://act.314actionfund.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/survey-djt/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Do+you+approve+of+President+Trump&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&refcode=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval")

Listen, more than 42 million Americans have become unemployed in the last 11 weeks, more than 100,000 Americans have passed away due to COVID-19, and President Trump is sending out military force to deal with peaceful protestors.

Through all of this, Trump has chosen to fan the flames and divide our country at every step. **Make no mistake about it; he is wholly unfit to lead.**

This year, we have the opportunity to vote out Donald Trump and rid ourselves of his constant divisiveness.

**We at 314 are ready to vote out Donald Trump, but we still need to hear from our supporters.**

[Take 5 seconds and be one of [431] in your area to answer now:](https://act.314actionfund.%3D/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://314action.org/survey-djt/?firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&city=&state=&phone=&occupation=&employer=&&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+Take+5+seconds+and+be+one+of+431+in+STAT&utm_campaign=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&source=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval&refcode=314_EM_SV_200604_3MO-3MC_1M10xOP-1WC_STD_1_Trumpapproval")

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Climate justice is racial justice
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/308?t=2&akid=405%2E53494%2ENe1sYZ) Friend, At a time when the president is calling for deploying the U.S. military against protestors, it is incumbent on every ally and group to speak up and take action for racial justice. **Evergreen Action stands in solidarity with those across the country protesting and demanding justice for George Floyd, Breonna Taylor, Tony McDade, Ahmaud Arbery, and others who have lost their lives to violent acts of systemic racism, including police violence.** These deaths were an avoidable tragedy. The ongoing disproportionate rate of COVID-19 death in Black communities is an avoidable tragedy. **We must be clear: Continuing to invest in broken systems that enable police brutality is a choice. Tear gassing protestors during a pandemic is a choice. Allowing fossil fuel corporations to poison Black and brown neighborhoods, causing and inflaming diseases, is a choice.** Each of these assaults on the lives of people and the functioning of our democracy are products of structural racism and the result of intentional policy choices. At the core of our work is the idea that climate justice is racial justice. We believe that confronting a system of economic exclusion and environmental racism must be at the core of any climate plan for America. This movement for environmental justice must be driven by a bottom-up approach that puts the voices and lived experiences of frontline communities at the center of building a clean and just economy. We must reject the systemic racism that is intrinsic in our fossil fuel economy and in the unequal devastation of the climate crisis. And when we do, we cannot simply rebuild a greener version of the status quo. **America must choose to build something better, more just, that values Black life.** **[And you can help build it right now. Make a donation today and help fund groups that are at the forefront of the fight against racism and police brutality.](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/365?t=3&akid=405%2E53494%2ENe1sYZ)** Thank you for committing to a more just future, Team Evergreen
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](https://act.evergreenaction.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=405%2E53494%2ENe1sYZ). Contributions or gifts to EVERGREEN ACTION are not tax deductible. | PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
---

name: MJ Hegar
subject: 🚨Sen. Cornyn calls unemployment coverage “a mistake” 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
With record unemployment numbers in Texas, Sen. Cornyn decided that expanded unemployment coverage in the CARES Act was "a mistake."

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890011/7f51f7bc/4ec83151/4ef684c8/4018583149/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | [](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890011/7f51f7bc/4ec83151/4ef684cf/4018583149/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjE0OTkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-lessthan1yr?refcode=email_20200604.2nd__1499__&amount=10")
---
Look, Peter, families all across Texas are going through a tough time right now. Nearly 2 million hard working Texans have lost their jobs and health insurance as our unemployment rate reached a record high. Things aren't going to snap back to normal, and Texans need help right now. So what has our senator, John Cornyn, done about it? Here's a quick timeline:
* **First** he voted against expanding unemployment benefits.
* **Then** he patted himself on the back about those benefits, calling them a "lifeline" to Texans.
* **Finally,** after a lunch with his DC bosses, he called those very same benefits "a mistake." Seriously!

Let me be clear: I don't think that lending a hand to MILLIONS of hard working Texans who've lost their jobs due to a pandemic (through benefits that _they 've paid taxes into_) is a mistake, and I think it's time for a senator from Texas who'll have workers' backs.

**Will you help me out and make sure that the next senator from Texas will be the fighter Texas families need?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Christy Smith
subject: I want the suffering to end. I want justice done.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

This moment is unmistakable, a clear call for inward reflection and concrete action to address clear inequities in our society.

**For far too long, we have seen Black Americans face unequal treatment** in our criminal justice and health care systems, when seeking employment or housing for their families, or even when simply trying to exercise their right to vote.

We must do better, and it must start with ensuring no Black American fears for their safety when engaging with law enforcement.

I don't share the lived experiences of people of color, but as a mother, I feel a mother's pain. As a neighbor and friend, I want the suffering to end. As an ally, I want justice to be done.

Allies and leaders must take time to listen to our Black neighbors, to hear their struggles -- and then we must take peaceful action.

It is on all of us to bridge the divide in our country and put in the work necessary to heal wounds that have been present for generations of Americans.

I am confident, if we stay committed, and we must, that we will one day realize the promise of equality that is at the heart of our shared values.

Stay safe, and stay strong.

\-- Christy |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress.
---|---
|
This email was sent by **[Christy Smith](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb86/29776869/9b025bc/569f3e8b/1584957785/VEsH/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://www.christyforcongress.org/")**
777 S. Figueroa Street, Suite 4050, Los Angeles, CA 90017-5864.

If you no longer want to hear from Christy Smith, [**click here to get off all our lists instantly.**](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb86/29776869/9b025bc/569f3e84/1584957785/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.christyforcongress.org/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") Questions or concerns? name: =?utf-8?Q?Kathaleen=20Wall?=
subject: Tele-Townhall TONIGHT about DC's wasteful spending
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathaleen Wall for Congress
body:
Join Kathaleen Wall and TX Comptroller Glenn Hegar at 7pm | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ebd2d56594c8/release-kathaleen-wall-responds-to-the-house-vote-to-impeach-president-trump-12524025?e=01c99b7fbd)
---
| |
---
| **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE: KathaleenWall.com** Thursday, June 4, 2020
---
| | **Conservative Kathaleen Wall To Be Joined By Texas Comptroller Glenn Hegar Thursday Evening For Tele-Townhall **

_Sugar Land Republican To Discuss Washington’s Wasteful Spending, Reopening Texas’ Economy With Conservative Statewide Elected Official_
**(Sugar Land, TX)** – Sugar Land Republican Congressional Candidate (TX-22) Kathaleen Wall will hold a tele-townhall with Texas Comptroller Glenn Hegar at 7:00pm tonight to discuss Washington’s wasteful spending and what needs to happen next in our push to reopen Texas’ economy. Hegar’s participation in Wall’s tele-townhall comes at a critical time in the run-up to the July 14th Republican runoff election, and so far Wall has announced an impressive list of endorsing conservatives in her campaign for Congress.

Wall has been actively engaging with Texas small businesses and restaurant owners during the COVID shutdown and in the weeks since Gov. Greg Abbott has begun to reopen our state, hosting tele-townhalls and participating in discussions on how best to get people back to their regular lives and help our economy recover.

“Nobody has been more active on the frontlines of managing Texas’ finances and making sure we re-open Texas rapidly, smartly and safely than Comptroller Hegar,” noted Wall. “I’m honored to have his participation in tonight’s tele-townhall as well as endorsements from conservative all-stars including U.S. Rand Paul (R-KY); Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton; Penny Nance, CEO and President of Concerned Women for America; Texas Commissioner of Agriculture Sid Miller; Wayne Christian, Chairman, Texas Railroad Commission; the National Association for Gun Rights; the Texas Home School Coalition; the Susan B. Anthony List and Texas Right to Life.”

###
---
|
---

Hegar’s participation in Wall’s tele-townhall comes at a critical time in the run-up to the July 14th Republican runoff election, and so far Wall has announced an impressive list of endorsing conservatives in her campaign for Congress. Wall has been actively engaging with Texas small businesses and restaurant owners during the COVID shutdown and in the weeks since Gov. Greg Abbott has begun to reopen our state, hosting tele-townhalls and participating in discussions on how best to get people back to their regular lives and help our economy recover. “Nobody has been more active on the frontlines of managing Texas’ finances and making sure we re-open Texas rapidly, smartly and safely than Comptroller Hegar,” noted Wall. “I’m honored to have his participation in tonight’s tele-townhall as well as endorsements from conservative all-stars including U.S. Rand Paul (R-KY); Texas Attorney General Ken Paxton; Penny Nance, CEO and President of Concerned Women for America; Texas Commissioner of Agriculture Sid Miller; Wayne Christian, Chairman, Texas Railroad Commission; the National Association for Gun Rights; the Texas Home School Coalition; the Susan B. body:
First, I would like to say congratulations to all Hoosier Republicans elected on Tuesday to serve as delegates at our virtual 2020 Indiana Republican | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/more-updates-indiana-republican-state-convention-469305?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=156b33c04c&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Indiana Republicans,

First, I would like to say congratulations to all Hoosier Republicans elected on Tuesday to serve as delegates at our [virtual 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=d7245a3926&e=1acd9bb3d6). Due to continuing impacts of COVID-19, our 2020 Indiana Republican State Convention will look a little different this year – but will still ensure our delegates select our nominees for lieutenant governor and attorney general.

With our virtual convention on June 18 approaching quickly, we wanted to make sure that you had all the information about convention -- including how voting will work.

**That's why we've put together this[video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1b0fb36c69&e=1acd9bb3d6) taking you through the process step by step, and answering a few frequently asked questions. I'd really encourage you to take a few minutes to watch this [video](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=88fa1d49fe&e=1acd9bb3d6), and share it with anyone who will also be a delegate this year. **

And then for more information -- including upcoming deadlines, a link for paying delegate fees, and more FAQs -- you can also [visit our updated convention website here](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=1c9be46443&e=1acd9bb3d6). **For Hoosiers serving as delegates, make sure you pay your $50 delegate fee by June 9.**
Your Indiana Republican State Committee is committed to protecting our delegates’ rights to select our party nominees for lieutenant governor and attorney general. **Through it all, delegates’ voices and votes are fundamental.**

Thank you,
Chairman Kyle Hupfer

---

name: Mike Franken
subject: Thank you for fighting with me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Franken for Iowa
body:
We left everything on the field. You called, texted, emailed, tweeted, and even shouted from cars. I'm humbled by the degree of your support, and the level of your commitment to our cause.
|
---
| |
---

| | Hello, everyone. This journey has come to a close. Tuesday night was difficult; there's no other way to put it. As a team, we left everything on the field. You called, texted, emailed, tweeted, and even shouted from cars. I'm humbled by the degree of your support, and the level of your commitment to our cause. And, let's be clear, we made an impact. What was supposed to be a runaway race, predetermined a year in advance became threatened by our persistent issues-based messaging. Only an onslaught of outside funding turned the tide, and we fell short. I was the last to join the race, but we finished a strong second with the most cherished endorsements in the state. Nearly 10 million dollars -- ten times our overall budget and over twenty-five times our advertising budget -- was used to beat our message. We lost in the TV markets, pounded by one side, but unaffordable for us. Regardless, the strength of our campaign has received rave reviews. We can stand tall. Now the important part. I centered my campaign around responsible leadership and a visionary future for every Iowan and this nation. There is no room for grudges, no space for spite, and no tolerance for tribalism. We carry on! No matter how crestfallen you are, this is time to hold your head high, confident that we will be back. **Our mission is to defeat Joni Ernst.** **You can help to beat Joni Ernst by contributing to Theresa Greenfield 's campaign. We need to ensure her campaign is unstoppable. ** [_**You may contribute to her campaign and every other Democrat running for federal office here.**_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd288/3682530377/VEsH/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_for_iowa_dems?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200604_em_fr_split_all_l1") | [Support Iowa Democrats >>](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd289/3682530377/VEsE/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/mf_for_iowa_dems?amount=10&refcode=FRA_20200604_em_fr_split_all_btn")
---
**Theresa Greenfield (Senate):[_www.greenfieldforiowa.com_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd28a/3682530377/VEsF/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://www.greenfieldforiowa.com")**
**Congresswoman Abby Finkenauer (1st District):[_www.abbyfinkenauer.com_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd28b/3682530377/VEsC/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://www.abbyfinkenauer.com")**
**Rita Hart (2nd District):[_www.ritahart.com_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd284/3682530377/VEsD/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://www.ritahart.com")**
**Congresswoman Cindy Axne (3rd District):[_www.cindyaxneforcongress.com_](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd285/3682530377/VEsA/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://www.cindyaxneforcongress.com")**
**J.D. Scholten (4th District):[www.scholten4iowa.com](https://act.frankenforiowa.org/page/m/b7f2578/33365068/4a447a87/3f8bd286/3682530377/VEsB/?g=DOn8TVNw52hdfH9rXQFzC_A "http://www.scholten4iowa.com")**
Thank you for your diligence and thank you for supporting my campaign staff. I am eternally grateful.
Time to win in November.
Signing off,
Vice Admiral Michael T. Franken, USN (ret.)
Proud Democrat

---

name: Unite the Country
subject: The American story
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unite the Country, [www
body:
Our new video highlights Joe Biden's remarks on racial injustice
#
Peter --
Yesterday we released a new video highlighting Joe Biden's remarks on racial injustice, calling on us to be the America we can be.

Voters see Donald Trump's disastrous and dangerous presidency in starker contrast today than ever before. Instead of supporting protests calling for justice and equality, Donald Trump had peaceful demonstrators tear-gassed so he could get a photo op. It's time for every American to ask: Is this who we want to be?

**Will you watch it and then share with your social networks?**
[](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7643/287b9173/2b055542/7e767d95/3699774537/VEsH/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1268269553898962945?s=20")
**[WATCH ON TWITTER](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7643/287b9173/2b055542/7e767d95/3699774537/VEsE/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1268269553898962945?s=20")**
**[WATCH ON FACEBOOK](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7643/287b9173/2b055542/7e767d96/3699774537/VEsF/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=2580115598919485")**
As Joe said earlier this week in Philadelphia, this is a wake up call to our nation. This is a battle for the soul of the country. Now is the time for us to come together and unite for justice.
**Will you share our new video with your[friends on Facebook](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7643/287b9173/2b055542/7e767d96/3699774537/VEsC/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://www.facebook.com/watch/?v=2580115598919485") and your [followers on Twitter](https://act.unitethecountry.com/page/m/46df7643/287b9173/2b055542/7e767d95/3699774537/VEsD/?g=x7_OMVH8x8VdxQ307JVTQtA "https://twitter.com/UniteCountryPAC/status/1268269553898962945?s=20")? **
In solidarity,
Unite the Country
